title: Treeplacer - WWEE
description: Datapack for Treeplacer and William Wythers' Expanded Ecosphere.
body:
![Banner artwork.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a4994b989a66ccb71d18c26a9eedc954d4e3914.jpeg)

This is a Treeplacer datapack for William Wythers' Expanded Ecosphere.

Most trees should be possible to grow however some trees that are generated using multiple components are likely not setup with this datapack (at least for now), although that mainly includes some very unique large trees and some of the very tall mega ones.

Note: Which tree grows from which sapling is decided by the primary leaves of the tree and not the logs.

Treeplacer v1.3.0+ is now required since v2.0.0.

# FAQ

<details>
<summary>Can I use this in my modpack?</summary>
Yes, go for it! Just make sure to use the appropriate source for your modpack (Modrinth/CurseForge).
</details>

<details>
<summary>Will this be ported to x.x.x version?</summary>
Feel free to open up a version port request on my issue tracker and I will see what I can do.
</details>
